# Folded Paper Engine Pin

- Release: `v1.0.11`
- Published: 2026-06-02
- Upstream: <https://github.com/papercraftgames/folded-paper-engine>
- Godot archive: `folded_paper_engine_godot.zip`
- License: MIT

The unpacked addon under `addons/folded_paper_engine/` is vendored so local and
CI builds use the same runtime. Upgrade only after running the complete demo
validation suite.
